```{r}
library(vcfR)
library(algatr)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(here)
library(ggpubr)
library(performance)
library(gstat)
library(sp)
library(spatialreg)
library(spdep)
library(cowplot)
source(here("general_functions.R"))
source(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "genetic_diversity.R"))

plotpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "outputs")

# Read in het data
callable_sites <- read.table(here("data", "ccgp_data", "58-Sceloporus_callable_sites_nsites.txt"))[1,1]

neutral <- 
  format_het(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "nogea.het"), callable_sites = callable_sites) %>%
  mutate(neutral_ho = Ho) %>%
  dplyr::select(IID, neutral_ho)

gea <- 
  format_het(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "gea.het"), callable_sites = 1)%>%
  mutate(gea_ho = 1 - `O(HOM)`/`N(NM)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(IID, gea_ho)

genes <- 
  format_het(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "genes.het"), callable_sites = 1) %>%
  mutate(genes_ho = 1 - `O(HOM)`/`N(NM)`) %>%
  dplyr::select(IID, genes_ho)

df <- 
  left_join(neutral, gea, by = "IID") %>%
  left_join(genes, by = "IID") 
```

```{r}
cols = c("GEA" = "cyan", "GEA genes" = "magenta")

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "gea_neutral_adaptive_ho.pdf"), width = 6, height = 5)
cols = c("GEA" = "#00d5d1", "GEA genes" = "#e800a6")
ggplot(df) +
  geom_point(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = gea_ho, color = "GEA", fill = "GEA"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_point(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = genes_ho, color = "GEA genes", fill = "GEA genes"), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = gea_ho, color = "GEA", fill = "GEA"), method = "lm") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = genes_ho, color = "GEA genes", fill = "GEA genes"), method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  # Remove fill legend
  #guides(fill = FALSE) +
  labs(col = "", fill = "") +
  xlab("Non-GEA heterozygosity") +
  ylab("GEA heterozygosity") 
dev.off()

coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% dplyr::rename(IID = SampleID) %>% st_transform(3310)
coords <- coords %>% left_join(df, by = "IID") %>% drop_na(neutral_ho)

gea_mod <- lm(gea_ho ~ neutral_ho, data = coords)
genes_mod <- lm(genes_ho ~ neutral_ho, data = coords)
coords$gea_resid <- residuals(gea_mod)
coords$genes_resid <- residuals(genes_mod)

gg_df <- 
  coords %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("gea_resid", "genes_resid"), names_to = "type", values_to = "Residuals") %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(
    type == "gea_resid" ~ "GEA",
    type == "genes_resid" ~ "GEA genes"
  )) 

ca <- get_ca()
plt1 <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
  geom_point(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = gea_ho, color = "GEA", fill = gea_resid), pch = 21, cex = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = genes_ho, color = "GEA genes", fill = genes_resid), pch = 21, cex = 2) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = gea_ho, color = "GEA"), method = "lm") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = genes_ho, color = "GEA genes"), method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#1434A4", mid = "#faf0e6", high = "#EC5800", midpoint = 0) +
  # Remove fill legend
  #guides(fill = FALSE) +
  labs(col = "", fill = "Residuals") +
  xlab("Non-GEA heterozygosity") +
  ylab("GEA heterozygosity") 

plt2 <- 
  ggplot(gg_df) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = Residuals, col = type), pch = 21, col = "gray20", cex = 2) + 
  # divergent color scale
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#1434A4", mid = "#faf0e6", high = "#EC5800", midpoint = 0) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#00d5d1", "#e800a6")) +
  facet_wrap(~type) +
  theme_void()

plt3a <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = neutral_ho)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
    labs(col = "Non-GEA Ho") +
    theme_void()
plt3b <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = gea_ho)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
    labs(col = "GEA Ho") +
    theme_void()
plt3c <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = genes_ho)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
    labs(col = "GEA genes Ho") +
    theme_void()


library(cowplot)
# Arrange plt3a, plt3b, plt3c in a single row
plt3 <- plot_grid(plt3a, plt3b, plt3c, nrow = 1)

# Arrange plt1 and plt2 in a single row
plt12 <- plot_grid(plt1, plt2, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(2, 3), labels = c("B", "C"))

# Arrange plt3 and plt12 in two rows
final_plot <- plot_grid(plt3, plt12, nrow = 2, labels = c("A", "", ""))

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "gea_neutral_adaptive_resid.pdf"), width = 12, height = 7)
final_plot
dev.off()
```

```{r}
coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% dplyr::rename(IID = SampleID) %>% st_transform(3310)
coords <- coords %>% left_join(df, by = "IID") %>% drop_na(neutral_ho)

gea_mod <- lm(gea_ho ~ neutral_ho, data = coords)
genes_mod <- lm(genes_ho ~ neutral_ho, data = coords)
coords$gea_resid <- residuals(gea_mod)
coords$genes_resid <- residuals(genes_mod)

gg_df <- 
  coords %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("gea_resid", "genes_resid"), names_to = "type", values_to = "Residuals") %>%
  mutate(type = case_when(
    type == "gea_resid" ~ "GEA",
    type == "genes_resid" ~ "GEA genes"
  )) %>%
  filter(type == "GEA genes")

ca <- get_ca()
plt1 <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
  geom_point(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = genes_ho, fill = genes_resid), pch = 21, cex = 2) +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = neutral_ho, y = genes_ho), method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#1434A4", mid = "#faf0e6", high = "#EC5800", midpoint = 0) +
  labs(col = "", fill = "Residuals") +
  xlab("Genome-wide genetic diversity") +
  ylab("Adaptive genetic diversity") 

plt2 <- 
  ggplot(gg_df) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = Residuals), pch = 21, col = "gray20", cex = 2) + 
  # divergent color scale
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#1434A4", mid = "#faf0e6", high = "#EC5800", midpoint = 0) +
  facet_wrap(~type) +
  theme_void()

plt3a <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = neutral_ho)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
    labs(col = "Genome-wide\ngenetic diversity") +
    theme_void()

plt3c <- 
  ggplot(coords) +
    geom_sf(data = ca) +
    geom_sf(aes(col = genes_ho)) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
    labs(col = "Adaptive\ngenetic diversity") +
    theme_void()


library(cowplot)
# Arrange plt3a, plt3b, plt3c in a single row
plt3 <- plot_grid(plt3a, plt3c, nrow = 1)

# Arrange plt1 and plt2 in a single row
plt12 <- plot_grid(plt1, plt2, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(2, 3), labels = c("B", "C"))

# Arrange plt3 and plt12 in two rows
final_plot <- plot_grid(plt3, plt12, nrow = 2, labels = c("A", "", ""))

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "gea_neutral_adaptive_resid.pdf"), width = 10, height = 7)
final_plot
dev.off()
```

# Spatial models
```{r}
# Run OLS and get residuals
f <- formula(genes_ho ~ neutral_ho)
ols_model <- lm(f, data = coords)
coords$ols_resids <- residuals(ols_model)

# Fit variograms to the residuals
ols_variogram <- variogram(ols_resids ~ 1, data = coords)
ols_vgm <- map(c("Exp", "Sph", "Gau"), ~fit.variogram(ols_variogram, model = vgm(.x)))
names(ols_vgm) <- c("Exp", "Sph", "Gau")

pdf(here(plotpath, "ols_variogram.pdf"))
plot(ols_variogram, ols_vgm[["Exp"]], main = "OLS Residuals Variogram (Exponential)")
plot(ols_variogram, ols_vgm[["Sph"]], main = "OLS Residuals Variogram (Spherical)")
plot(ols_variogram, ols_vgm[["Gau"]], main = "OLS Residuals Variogram (Gaussian)")
dev.off()

# Based on visual inspection, the exponential model seems to fit best
# Get the range of the variogram (3 times the range parameter)
vgm_range <- ols_vgm[["Exp"]] %>% filter(model == "Exp") %>% pull(range)
print(vgm_range)

# Create a spatial weights matrix using the range from the variogram
nb <- dnearneigh(coords, d1 = 0, d2 = vgm_range)
listw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

# Fit an SEM model
sem_model <- errorsarlm(f, data = coords, listw = listw, zero.policy = TRUE)
summary(sem_model)
coords$sem_resids <- residuals(sem_model)

# Calculate Moran's I before and after accounting for spatial autocorrelation
moran.test(coords$ols_resids, listw)$estimate
moran.test(coords$sem_resids, listw)$estimate

coords$sem_fitted <- sem_model$fitted
coords$ols_fitted <- ols_model$fitted

# Plot predicted vs observed
pdf(here(plotpath, "predicted_vs_observed.pdf"), width = 4, height = 4)
ggplot(coords, aes(x = ols_fitted, y = genes_ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  xlab("Predicted Adaptive Heterozygosity") +
  ylab("Observed Adaptive Heterozygosity") +
  ggtitle("OLS") +
  theme_classic()
ggplot(coords, aes(x = sem_fitted, y = genes_ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  xlab("Predicted Adaptive Heterozygosity") +
  ylab("Observed Adaptive Heterozygosity") +
  ggtitle("SEM") +
  theme_classic()
dev.off()
```

### All variables
```{r}
mod_vars <- c("NDVI", "gHM", "bio1", "lgm_lig", "glacier", "tmean_dif")
mod_df <- read_csv(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "model_df.csv"))%>% left_join(coords, by = c("SampleID" = "IID"))
mod_df_scaled <- mod_df %>% mutate(across(all_of(mod_vars), scale)) 
```
```{r}
f <- paste("sem_resids ~", paste(paste0(mod_vars), collapse = " + "))
mod <- lm(f, data = mod_df_scaled, na.action = "na.fail")
summary(mod)
AIC(mod) 
car::vif(mod) 
# Get RSQ
summary(mod) # R^2 = 0.53

pdf(here(plotpath, "sp_resids_all.pdf"), width = 22, height = 7)
gglm_ls <- map(mod_vars, ~gglm(x = .x, y = "sem_resids", mod_df))
ggpartial_ls <- map(mod_vars, ~ggpartial(x = .x, y = "sem_resids", f = mod_vars, col = .x, df = mod_df))
do.call(
  cowplot::plot_grid,
  c(c(gglm_ls, ggpartial_ls), nrow = 2)
)
check_model(mod)
dev.off()
```

# Future correlations
```{r}
files <- list.files(here("data", "env", "csi", "Layers", "future"), full.names = TRUE, pattern = "csi*")
csi_future <- rast(map(files, rast))
csi_future <- crop(csi_future, ca)
csi_future <- mask(csi_future, ca)
names(csi_future) <- c("SSP 1-2.6", "SSP 2-4.5", "SSP 3-7.0", "SSP 5-8.5")

df_sf <- 
  coords%>%
  mutate(csi_future = extract(csi_future, .)[,2]) 

pdf(here(plotpath, "future.pdf"), width = 12, height = 4)
plt1 <-
  ggplot(df_sf, aes(x = 1 - csi_future, y = neutral_ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Future climate stability", y = "Genome-wide heterozygosity") +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x = min(1 - df_sf$csi_future), label.y = min(df_sf$neutral_ho))
plt2 <-
  ggplot(df_sf, aes(x = 1 - csi_future, y = genes_ho)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Future climate stability", y = "Adaptive heterozygosity") +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x = min(1 - df_sf$csi_future), label.y = min(df_sf$genes_ho))
plt3 <- 
  ggplot(df_sf, aes(x = 1 - csi_future, y = sem_resids)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Future climate stability", y = "Residual adaptive heterozygosity") +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", label.x = min(1 - df_sf$csi_future), label.y = min(df_sf$sem_resids))

plot_grid(plt1, plt2, plt3, nrow = 1)
dev.off()

```

# PCA

```{r}
process_pca <- function(path){
  pca <- read.table(path)
  pca <- 
    pca %>% 
    rename(SampleID = V2) %>% 
    select(-V1) %>% 
    rename(PC1 = V3, PC2 = V4, PC3 = V5) %>%
    # add RGB
    mutate(RGB_PC1 = scales::rescale(PC1, to = c(0, 1)),
           RGB_PC2 = scales::rescale(PC2, to = c(0, 1)),
           RGB_PC3 = scales::rescale(PC3, to = c(0, 1))
    )
  return(pca)
}

coords <- get_coords(sf = TRUE)
pca_genes <- 
  process_pca(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "genes.eigenvec")) %>%
  left_join(coords, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(SampleID != "Scelocci_CHI1382_DAW5-46-21") %>%
  st_as_sf()
pca_nogea <- 
  process_pca(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "nogea.eigenvec"))  %>%
  left_join(coords, by = "SampleID") %>%
  filter(SampleID != "Scelocci_CHI1382_DAW5-46-21") %>% 
  mutate(PC2 = -PC2, RGB_PC2 = scales::rescale(PC2, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(PC1 = -PC1, RGB_PC1 = scales::rescale(PC1, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  mutate(PC3 = -PC3, RGB_PC3 = scales::rescale(PC3, to = c(0, 1))) %>%
  st_as_sf()

# Plot RGB 
outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
pdf(here(outpath, "genes_pca.pdf"), width = 6, height = 3)
minvals <- min(pca_genes$PC1, pca_genes$PC2)
maxvals <- max(pca_genes$PC1, pca_genes$PC2)
leg <- 
  ggplot(pca_genes) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity() +
  annotate("segment", x = minvals * 1.1, xend = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, yend = 0, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0, y = minvals * 1.1, yend = maxvals * 1.1, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("text", x = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, label = "PC1", color = "black", hjust = -0.1) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = maxvals * 1.1, label = "PC2", color = "black", vjust = -0.1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4), ylim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4))
plt <- 
  ggplot(pca_genes) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity()

plot_grid(plt, leg, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 1))


minvals <- min(pca_nogea$PC1, pca_nogea$PC2)
maxvals <- max(pca_nogea$PC1, pca_nogea$PC2)
leg <- 
  ggplot(pca_nogea) +
  geom_point(aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity() +
  annotate("segment", x = minvals * 1.1, xend = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, yend = 0, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("segment", x = 0, xend = 0, y = minvals * 1.1, yend = maxvals * 1.1, arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.2, "cm"))) +
  annotate("text", x = maxvals * 1.1, y = 0, label = "PC1", color = "black", hjust = -0.1) +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = maxvals * 1.1, label = "PC2", color = "black", vjust = -0.1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4), ylim = c(minvals * 1.4, maxvals * 1.4))
plt <- 
  ggplot(pca_nogea) +
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_sf(aes(color = rgb(RGB_PC1, RGB_PC2, RGB_PC3))) +
  theme_void() +
  scale_color_identity()

plot_grid(plt, leg, ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1, 1))
dev.off()
```
